title: Pakistan Plans to Cut Tax on Menstrual Pads, but Many Say It’s Not Enough
summary_full: Activists said more action was needed to solve the larger problem: Only 12 percent of Pakistani women and girls use safe, commercially made menstrual products.
summary_public: Activists said more action was needed to solve the larger problem: Only 12 percent of Pakistani women and girls use safe, commercially made menstrual products.
